displayName: Multiple Failed Login Attempts by User
description: Detects multiple failed login attempts (Event ID 4625) for a single user account within a specified time period, indicating potential brute-force activity. This rule is based on Windows Security Events, Event ID 4625 (An account failed to log on).
query:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4625
| summarize Count = count() by TargetUserName
| where Count > 10
